metadata.title:
UNION MEN WON'T WAIT FOREVER IN PARTY


PRISON, SAYS C0MPERS.

pages.raw_text:
secure an increase Of wages was a
conspiracy to raise the price of la
Dor. Through the action of the
American trades unionists We Sc
cured it's change.


1--WE have secured lien laws
which guarantee a man his wages
when he has worked. The breaker
boys who work in the mines of
Pennsylvania were liberated by the
miners strike, and the public con-
science was so shocked that one
of the best labor laws in the coun-
try was passed in Pennsylvania.


"In addition to these our unions
have secured laws covering mining
safety appliances, pumps, car coup
ling laws to protect railroad men
from being smashed between the
cars which he is trying to couple;
laws for blowers to carry off the
dust from the polisher and the
buffer in the works and in machine
shops, together with other too num-
erous to mention"
